title: Tonestus microcephalus
taxonomy: Tonestus microcephalus is classified within the family Asteraceae, which is commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification places Tonestus microcephalus among other flowering plants that share similar characteristics. Within the Asteraceae family, Tonestus microcephalus is further classified as belonging to the tribe Gnaphalieae. The tribe Gnaphalieae is composed of small to medium-sized shrubs and herbs, often with daisy-like flowers. Tonestus microcephalus is native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China, where it is found growing in alpine meadows and rocky slopes.
